chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. S-04 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 167/2025 (Ex./A). 2. For Orders on CMA No. 168/2025 (Contempt). O R D E R. 07-07-2025. Mr. Sarfraz Ahmed Akhund advocate for respondents No. 8 to 11. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant AAG, Sindh along with SIP Iqbal Ahmed Noon SHO PS Hinogrja and ASI Hazoor Bux, ASI Irshad Ali and ASI Mehboob Ali. _____*******______ None present for the petitioners. Learned counsel for the respondents No. 8 to 11 states that neither the private respondents have harassed the petitioners nor intent to do so in future. Learned Assistant A.G states that civil dispute as well as criminal litigation is going on between the petitioners and private respondents, hence they are inimical to each other; however official respondents are legally bound to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to both the parties in accordance with law. In view of above, the listed applications are disposed of. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
